# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: static-website-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    cors:
    - origin:
      - '*'
      method:
      - GET
      - HEAD
      responseHeader:
      - Content-Type
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600

- name: bucket-iam-binding
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    bucket: $(ref.static-website-bucket.name)
  accessControl:
    entity: allUsers
    role: READER
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - static-website-bucket

- name: bucket-public-access-prevention
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:virtual.buckets.setIamPolicy
  properties:
    bucket: $(ref.static-website-bucket.name)
    policy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers
      - role: roles/storage.admin
        members:
        - serviceAccount:$(ref.static-website-bucket.projectNumber)@cloudservices.gserviceaccount.com
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - static-website-bucket
